name: Client Operating Model Phase 8 Build Sandbox Drift
outcome_goal: Implement sandbox promotion/readback/drift primitives: promotion manifests, execution evidence, predicted-vs-actual comparison, drift reason codes, bug/gap handoff, and tests.
anti_requirements: Do not stage or commit git changes.
Do not broaden ad hoc sandbox scenarios beyond the manifest.
Do not mark implementation defects without excluding environment/contract/harness causes.
Do not regenerate shared docs/API.md, docs/CLI.md, or docs/MCP.md in this parallel chain; Phase 11 owns final shared surface docs.

jobs.label: phase_08_sandbox_drift_build
jobs.prompt: Build Phase 8 from artifacts/workflow/client_operating_model/packets/phase_08_sandbox_drift/PLAN.md. Implement bounded sandbox promotion and drift evidence primitives: promotion manifest contract, execution/readback evidence records, predicted-vs-actual comparison, stable drift reason codes, severity/disposition, gap/bug handoff contracts, and stop/continue summary output. Keep production rollout out of scope and avoid live environment mutation unless existing tests already use safe fixtures. Add tests for match, partial_match, drift, blocked evidence, environment-origin drift, and classification guardrails. Write artifacts/workflow/client_operating_model/build_reports/phase_08_IMPLEMENTATION.md with changed files, validation, blockers, and Phase 9/10 dependency notes. Do not stage or commit.
